reference: I have been experiencing erectile dysfunction for about three years. Viagra, Cialis, or anything else has not helped. However, one of the symptoms I have experienced has been swollen testicles immediately following a bowel movement, along with some abdominal pain when this occurs. There has also been some minor testicular pain even before a bowel movement. I have had extremely low testosterone as well and think that each of these issues is associated with one another. Please help.
text: I have been experiencing erectile dysfunction for about three years. Viagra, Cialis, anything else has not helped.
